title: hapalochilus reflexus
intro: Hapalochilus reflexus is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, commonly known as the reflexed hapalochilus. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of conditions such as fever, cough, and digestive issues. Hapalochilus reflexus is traditionally prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and has been reported to offer health benefits including relief from respiratory problems, improved digestion, and enhanced immune function.
